name: ninochavez.co Blueprint
tagline: Stakeholder review portal for the v3 redesign of ninochavez.co. Each prototype page renders the proposed surface alongside what exists today, with the design rationale in the strategy drawer.

flows.label: Cold landing — first viewport to scope discovery
flows.summary: P1 reviewer lands on / cold. Hero → cluster ribbon (compressed) → /work (full ribbon) → cluster section deep dive.

flows.label: Scope discovery — exposing breadth
flows.summary: Reviewer walks the 8 cluster sections on /work to see the full surface area (69 repos, 17 deploys, 275 published artifacts) rather than the v2 9-item curated slate.

flows.label: Case-study deep dive
flows.summary: Reviewer drills into a lead case study (atelier, cortex, ask-dad, bc-subscriptions, ask-bc, rally-hq) — schematic + approach + quotable artifact + outcome.

flows.label: Practice deep read
flows.summary: Reviewer reads /practice end-to-end — production line, substrate, operating rules, instrumentation evidence.

flows.label: Reach out
flows.summary: Reviewer decides to contact — single form + receipts row, no sales-funnel framing.
